mapper.select:
/* IfWcsInboundMapper.selectPutawayInfo - WMS적치지시결과 데이터 조회 */ SELECT SIBWCS.CTKEY AS CTKEY , SIBWCS.OWKEY AS OWKEY , RIBICWCS.CODE AS ICKEY , CASE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN RIBWCS.LOCATION_CODE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS = 'DELETED' THEN NULL WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' THEN SIBWCS.FROM_LOCATION ELSE RIBWCS.LOCATION_CODE END AS TO_LCKEY , CASE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN SIBWCS.FROM_LOCATION WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' THEN RIBWCS.LOCATION_CODE ELSE SIBWCS.FROM_LOCATION END AS FR_LCKEY , CASE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' THEN 0 ELSE RIBICWCS.ACCEPTED_QUANTITY_VALUE * ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY END AS CFQTY , ILBHS.IVATKEY AS TO_IVATKEY , ILBHS.ULCKEY AS ULCKEY , IC.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD , SIBWCS.ORDER_TYPE AS ORDER_TYPE , SIBWCS.HDKEY AS IBHDKEY , SIBWCS.DTKEY AS IBDTKEY , CASE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS = 'DELETED' THEN NULL ELSE SIBWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE END AS IB_FLOOR , IC.UOM , ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY , ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY , CASE WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS = 'DELETED' THEN 10 WHEN SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'D' AND RIBWCS.STATUS != 'DELETED' THEN 20 WHEN RIBWCS.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 40 ELSE 50 END AS ILBHS_WKSTATUS , RIBWCS.STATUS AS IF_STATUS , RIBWCS.REJECTED_MESSAGE AS IF_STATUS_MSG , SIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER AS LPN , CASE WHEN RIBWCS.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PUTORDERYN , SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , RIBICWCS.ACCEPTED_QUANTITY_VALUE , RIBICWCS.ACCEPTED_QUANTITY_UNIT , RIBICWCS.EXPIRATION_DATE , SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD AS TYPE FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBWCS RIBWCS ON SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = RIBWCS.IB_SEQ AND SIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER = RIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBICWCS RIBICWCS ON RIBWCS.R_IB_SEQ = RIBICWCS.R_IB_SEQ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_ILBHS ILBHS ON SIBWCS.CTKEY = ILBHS.CTKEY AND SIBWCS.OWKEY = ILBHS.OWKEY
AND SIBWCS.HDKEY = ILBHS.IBHDKEY AND SIBWCS.DTKEY = ILBHS.IBDTKEY
AND SIBWCS.HDKEY = ILBHS.TA_HDKEY AND SIBWCS.DTKEY = ILBHS.TA_DTKEY
AND SIBWCS.HDKEY = ILBHS.TA_HDKEY AND SIBWCS.DTKEY = ILBHS.TA_DTKEY
AND SIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER = ILBHS.LPN INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON SIBWCS.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND SIBWCS.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND RIBICWCS.CODE = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RIBICWCS.ACCEPTED_QUANTITY_UNIT = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE WHERE RIBWCS.IB_SEQ = #{ibSeq} AND RIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER = #{licensePlateNumber} AND SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'

/* IfWcsInboundMapper.selectIntfSibwcsTest - WCS입고주문 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SIBWCS.IB_SEQ , SIBWCS.IB_NUMBER , SIBWCS.ORDER_TYPE , SIBWCS.HDKEY , SIBWCS.DTKEY , SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SIBWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , SIBWCS.DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , SIBWCS.RECEIPT_BY_LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SIBWCS.WRAPPED , SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SIBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SIBWCS.ERROR_REASON , SIBWCS.CANCEL_IB_SEQ , SIBWCS.INSERTDATE , SIBWCS.INSERTURKEY , SIBWCS.UPDATEDATE , SIBWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBWCS RIBWCS ON SIBWCS.IB_NUMBER = RIBWCS.IB_NUMBER AND SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = RIBWCS.IB_SEQ WHERE SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = #{IB_SEQ}

/* IfWcsInboundMapper.selectIntfSibDtwcsTest - WCS입고주문상세 TEST 조회 */ SELECT IBIC_SEQ , IB_SEQ , CODE , PRODUCT_QUANTITY_VALUE , PRODUCT_QUANTITY_UNIT , EXPIRATION_DATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBICWCS WHERE IB_SEQ = #{IB_SEQ}

/* IfWcsInboundMapper.selectIntfSibicwcsTest - WCS입고주문상세 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SIBICWCS.IBIC_SEQ , SIBICWCS.IB_SEQ , SIBICWCS.CODE , SIBICWCS.PRODUCT_QUANTITY_VALUE , SIBICWCS.PRODUCT_QUANTITY_UNIT , SIBICWCS.EXPIRATION_DATE , SIBICWCS.INSERTDATE , SIBICWCS.INSERTURKEY , SIBICWCS.UPDATEDATE , SIBICWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBICWCS SIBICWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS ON SIBICWCS.IB_SEQ = SIBWCS.IB_SEQ WHERE SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = #{ibSeq} AND SIBWCS.IB_NUMBER = #{ibNumber} AND SIBWCS.CANCEL_IB_SEQ IS NULL AND SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'

/* IfWcsInboundMapper.selectIntfSibwcsTestBatch - WCS입고주문 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SIBWCS.IB_SEQ , SIBWCS.IB_NUMBER , SIBWCS.ORDER_TYPE , SIBWCS.HDKEY , SIBWCS.DTKEY , SIBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SIBWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SIBWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , SIBWCS.DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , SIBWCS.RECEIPT_BY_LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SIBWCS.WRAPPED , SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SIBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SIBWCS.ERROR_REASON , SIBWCS.CANCEL_IB_SEQ , SIBWCS.INSERTDATE , SIBWCS.INSERTURKEY , SIBWCS.UPDATEDATE , SIBWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBWCS RIBWCS ON SIBWCS.IB_NUMBER = RIBWCS.IB_NUMBER AND SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = RIBWCS.IB_SEQ WHERE RIBWCS.IB_NUMBER IS NULL AND SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'
